title: How to disable the delete button for item view in the app
excerpt:
We are trying to develop a item view app but all users can delete the view. 
Is it possible to disable the delete button with permission or smt.

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to develop a item view app but all users can delete the view.
Is it possible to disable the delete button with permission or smt.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bade and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I will check with the team responsible for this. The account in which you want to disable the deletion of item views, what type of monday plan does it have?

Cheers,
Matias
